title: Canadian Dal Stew
description: Hearty Canadian-inspired stew made with dal, toor, and pleasantly flavored spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add ginger and garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add dal and toor, and stir to combine.
Add curry powder and salt, and stir to combine.
Pour in 4 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until dal and toor are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
